en: The divisions of the sons of Aaron were these. The sons of Aaron: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
zh: 亞倫子孫的班次如下：亞倫的兒子是拿答、亞比戶、以利亞撒和以他瑪。

en: But Nadab and Abihu died before their father and had no children, so Eleazar and Ithamar became the priests.
zh: 拿答和亞比戶比他們的父親早死，又沒有兒子；所以以利亞撒和以他瑪作了祭司。

en: With the help of Zadok of the sons of Eleazar, and Ahimelech of the sons of Ithamar, David organized them according to the appointed duties in their service.
zh: 大衛和以利亞撒的子孫撒督，以及以他瑪的子孫亞希米勒，把他們的親族分開班次，按著他們的職責服事。

en: Since more chief men were found among the sons of Eleazar than among the sons of Ithamar, they organized them under sixteen heads of fathers' houses of the sons of Eleazar, and eight of the sons of Ithamar.
zh: 後來發現以利亞撒的子孫中，比以他瑪的子孫有更多作首領的，就把他們分開班次；以利亞撒子孫中作首領的，按著他們的家族有十六人；以他瑪子孫中作首領的，按著他們的家族有八人。

en: They divided them by lot, all alike, for there were sacred officers and officers of God among both the sons of Eleazar and the sons of Ithamar.
zh: 以抽籤的方式平均地把他們分開，因為在以利亞撒的子孫中和以他瑪的子孫中都有人在聖所作領袖，以及在 神面前作領袖。

en: And the scribe Shemaiah, the son of Nethanel, a Levite, recorded them in the presence of the king and the princes and Zadok the priest and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar and the heads of the fathers' houses of the priests and of the Levites, one father's house being chosen for Eleazar and one chosen for Ithamar.
zh: 作書記的利未人拿坦業的兒子示瑪雅，在君王、領袖、撒督祭司、亞比亞他的兒子亞希米勒，以及眾祭司家族和利未家族的首領面前，把他們的名字記錄下來。在以利亞撒的子孫中，有一家族被選取了；在以他瑪的子孫中，也有一家族被選取了。

en: The first lot fell to Jehoiarib, the second to Jedaiah,
zh: 第一籤抽出來的是耶何雅立，第二籤是耶大雅，

en: the third to Harim, the fourth to Seorim,
zh: 第三籤是哈琳，第四籤是梭琳，

en: the fifth to Malchijah, the sixth to Mijamin,
zh: 第五籤是瑪基雅，第六籤是米雅民，

en: the seventh to Hakkoz, the eighth to Abijah,
zh: 第七籤是哈歌斯，第八籤是亞比雅，

en: the ninth to Jeshua, the tenth to Shecaniah,
zh: 第九籤是耶書亞，第十籤是示迦尼，

en: the eleventh to Eliashib, the twelfth to Jakim,
zh: 第十一籤是以利亞實，第十二籤是雅金，

en: the thirteenth to Huppah, the fourteenth to Jeshebeab,
zh: 第十三籤是胡巴，第十四籤是耶是比押，

en: the fifteenth to Bilgah, the sixteenth to Immer,
zh: 第十五籤是璧迦，第十六籤是音麥，

en: the seventeenth to Hezir, the eighteenth to Happizzez,
zh: 第十七籤是希悉，第十八籤是哈闢悉，

en: the nineteenth to Pethahiah, the twentieth to Jehezkel,
zh: 第十九籤是毘他希雅，第二十籤是以西結，

en: the twenty-first to Jachin, the twenty-second to Gamul,
zh: 第二十一籤是雅斤，第二十二籤是迦末，

en: the twenty-third to Delaiah, the twenty-fourth to Maaziah.
zh: 第二十三籤是第來雅，第二十四籤是瑪西亞。

en: These had as their appointed duty in their service to come into the house of the LORD according to the procedure established for them by Aaron their father, as the LORD God of Israel had commanded him.
zh: 這就是他們的班次，是照著耶和華以色列的 神藉著他們的祖宗亞倫所吩咐的條例，進入耶和華的殿，辦理事務。

en: And of the rest of the sons of Levi: of the sons of Amram, Shubael; of the sons of Shubael, Jehdeiah.
zh: 利未還有其他子孫：暗蘭的子孫中有書巴業；書巴業的子孫中有耶希底亞。

en: Of Rehabiah: of the sons of Rehabiah, Isshiah the chief.
zh: 至於利哈比雅：利哈比雅的眾子中，長子是伊示雅。

en: Of the Izharites, Shelomoth; of the sons of Shelomoth, Jahath.
zh: 以斯哈的眾子中有示羅摩；示羅摩的眾子中有雅哈。

en: The sons of Hebron: Jeriah the chief, Amariah the second, Jahaziel the third, Jekameam the fourth.
zh: 希伯倫的兒子是：長子耶利雅 、次子亞瑪利亞、三子雅哈悉、四子耶加面。

en: The sons of Uzziel, Micah; of the sons of Micah, Shamir.
zh: 烏薛的眾子中有米迦；米迦的眾子中有沙密。

en: The brother of Micah, Isshiah; of the sons of Isshiah, Zechariah.
zh: 米迦的兄弟是耶西雅；耶西雅的眾子中有撒迦利雅。

en: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. The sons of Jaaziah: Beno.
zh: 米拉利的兒子是抹利、母示、雅西雅；雅西雅的兒子是比挪。

en: The sons of Merari: of Jaaziah, Beno, Shoham, Zaccur and Ibri.
zh: 米拉利的眾子中有雅西雅的兒子比挪、朔含、撒刻和伊比利。

en: Of Mahli: Eleazar, who had no sons.
zh: 抹利的兒子是以利亞撒；以利亞撒沒有兒子。

en: Of Kish, the sons of Kish: Jerahmeel.
zh: 至於基士：基士的眾子中有耶拉篾。

en: The sons of Mushi: Mahli, Eder, and Jerimoth. These were the sons of the Levites according to their fathers' houses.
zh: 母示的兒子是末力、以得和耶利摩；以上這些都是利未的子孫，按著他們的家族記錄。

en: These also, the head of each father's house and his younger brother alike, cast lots, just as their brothers the sons of Aaron, in the presence of King David, Zadok, Ahimelech, and the heads of fathers' houses of the priests and of the Levites.
zh: 他們在大衛王、撒督、亞希米勒，以及祭司和利未人的家族首領面前也抽了籤，好像他們的親族亞倫的子孫一樣；各家族首領和他們年幼的兄弟都一樣抽了籤。
